landing.heroSubtitle: The classic social deduction game — now with AI opponents
landing.feature1Desc: Play against smart AI with distinct personalities
landing.feature2Desc: Beautiful retro visuals for an immersive experience
landing.feature3Desc: Werewolf, Seer, Robber, Troublemaker, and more
landing.subscribeDesc: Pick the plan that suits your playstyle

setup.title: Game Setup
setup.apiKeyHint: API key is required for AI to speak during discussion
setup.noGamesRemaining: No games remaining. Purchase more to continue playing!

roles.werewolfDesc: Wake up and see other werewolves
roles.seerDesc: Look at one player's card or two center cards
roles.robberDesc: Swap your card with another player's
roles.insomniacDesc: Check your card at the end of the night
roles.drunkDesc: Swap your card with a center card (blind)
roles.hunterDesc: If you die, your vote target dies too
roles.tannerDesc: You win if you get killed
roles.minionDesc: You see the werewolves, they don't see you

game.noAction: You have no night action. Sleep tight!
game.finalRound: Final round! Voting begins after this
game.voteDesc: Who do you want to eliminate?
game.waitNightActions: Wait patiently while night actions are performed...
game.reasonNoWwNobodyDied: No werewolves in play and nobody was killed. Village wins!
game.reasonNoWwSomeoneDied: No werewolves in play but someone was killed. Werewolf team wins!
game.reasonWwKilled: A werewolf was killed! Village wins!
game.reasonNoWwKilled: No werewolf was killed. Werewolf team wins!
game.reasonTannerAlsoWins: Tanner also wins by getting killed!
game.quitConfirm: Are you sure you want to quit? Progress will be lost.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.loginRequired: Sign in to track your progress
achievements.noRoleData: Play some games to see role stats

legal.aboutContent:
One Night Werewolf is a digital adaptation of the beloved social deduction card game. Play against AI opponents with unique personalities in this fast-paced game of hidden roles and deception.

Built with modern web technologies, our goal is to bring the excitement of tabletop gaming to your browser — anytime, anywhere.
legal.contactContent: For questions, feedback, or support, please reach out to us via our GitHub repository or email.
legal.privacyIntro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use One Night Werewolf.
legal.privacyDataContent: When you sign in with Google, we store your display name, email, and profile photo to identify your account. We also store game statistics (wins, losses, roles played) linked to your account.
legal.privacyUsageContent: Your data is used solely to provide and improve the game experience: tracking your stats, managing subscriptions, and personalizing your profile. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.
legal.privacyCookiesContent: We use Firebase Authentication which may set cookies for session management. Game preferences may be stored in your browser's local storage.
legal.privacySecurityContent: Your data is stored securely using Firebase/Google Cloud infrastructure. Access to user data is restricted by authentication rules.
legal.termsIntro: By using One Night Werewolf, you agree to the following terms.
legal.termsServiceContent: One Night Werewolf is provided as-is for entertainment purposes. You must not abuse the service, attempt to exploit the AI system, or use automated tools to interact with the game.
legal.termsAccountContent: Free accounts receive a limited number of games. Paid plans (Starter, Monthly) grant additional games as described on the pricing page. Payments are processed through LemonSqueezy. Refund policies are governed by LemonSqueezy's terms.
legal.termsContentContent: While the game is primarily single-player against AI, you agree not to misuse the service in any way that could harm the platform or other users.
legal.termsChangesContent: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
